issues.description: Second effect completely wrong. Card text says 'look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of the deck in any order' — this is a deck manipulation action (SearchDeck or similar scrying), NOT DrawCard + TrashFromHand. The DSL describes drawing 2 cards and discarding 1, which contradicts the official text.
Trigger type 'Trigger' is incorrect. The second action flows from the Counter trigger as a continuation (implied by 'Then'), so it should be part of the same Counter trigger, not a separate Trigger.
Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is correct but card says 'Up to 1', implying the choice is optional. Verify target model supports 'up to' semantics.
